---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for the Unity2Foxglove SDK
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use Case

Describe the scenario where this feature would be useful. What problem does it solve?

## Proposed API or Behavior

What would the feature look like from the user's perspective? Include example code if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Are there workarounds today? What other approaches did you consider?

## Additional Context

Any references, mockups, or related issues.

> Note: This SDK is a Unity-focused Foxglove bridge, not a full foxglove-sdk replacement. Feature requests should align with this scope.
